_description: Form auth modem with login_page for fixture integrity tests
modem_yaml:
manufacturer: Solent Labs
model: T200
auth:
  strategy: form
  action: /goform/Login
  login_page: /LoginPage.asp
  username_field: user
  password_field: pass
  cookie_name: SessionID
  success:
    redirect: /Index.asp
login_page_html: <html><body><form name="login" method="POST" action="/goform/Login"><input type="hidden" name="token" value="abc" /></form></body></html>
